name: HMCS Port Hope (J 280)
events: 20 May 1944 Around 0830 Q/20, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) departed from St. John's for Halifax. She is escorted by HMCS Port Hope (T/Lt. R.M. Montague, RCNVR).
On departure exercises were carried out with Canadian ASW aircraft. (1)
22 May 1944 Around 1530 Q/22, HrMs O 21 (Lt. F.J. Kroesen, RNN) and HMCS Port Hope (T/Lt. R.M. Montague, RCNVR) arrived at Halifax from St. John's. (1)
